title: EQ - Custom EQ, UI screen, first time
scenario: Custom EQ screen displays sliders sorted high-to-low with default middle values, and disabled Reset/Save buttons on first access
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure a device that supports EQ is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
7. Observe the Custom EQ screen UI.
expected: A screen with sliders appears. The number of sliders depends on the device. Default slider values are set to the middle. Sliders are sorted from high to low frequency. Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons are present but disabled.
